Zusätzlich komplettieren Obstbäume und Beerensträucher die Angebotsvielfalt. Das Projekt geschieht in Abstimmung mit der Stadtverwaltung und der Stadtgärtnerei. Die Bewohnerinnen und Bewohnern von Wels werden für die Bepflanzung, Pflege und Ernte aktiv mit eingebunden. description: Bei der Kultur-Garten-Gemeinschaft soll im Stadtbereich von Wels ein Ort der Begegnung geschaffen werden. An diesem Ort wird ein gemeinsam gestalteter Garten entstehen. Der Garten wird zum gemeinsamen Gemüse-, Kräuter- sowie Obstanbau nach biologischen und permakulturellen Gesichtspunkten für alle Beteiligten zur Verfügung stehen. Interessierte Mitmenschen aus Wels sollen in der Stadt die Möglichkeit bekommen, miteinander eigenes qualitativ hochwertiges Gemüse in nachhaltiger Weise zu kultivieren.. type: freespace;community_garden. curated by: Suedwind

name: Leisenhofgärtnerei
description: In der idyllischen Demeter-Gärtnerei kann nicht nur regionales Obst und Gemüse direkt vor Ort erworben werden, sondern auch GartenfreundInnen sind herzlich eingeladen beim Pflanzen und Ernten mit anzupacken. Fleißige Helferlein drüfen sich dann frisches Obst, Gemüse und Kräuter mit nach Hause nehmen. Außerdem sind Milchprodukte, Eier, Käse, Brot, Säfte uvm. von Partnerbetrieben des Hofs erhältlich. Die Leisenhof-Gärtnerei fördert bewusst stadtnahe Ernährung und betreibt außerdem zwei Gemeinschaftsgärten (Hofgarten, Petrinumgarten).. type: farm_shop;directtrade;food_souvereignity;community_garden;community_group;other_buylocal. curated by: Suedwind

name: ASW – Aktionsgemeinschaft Solidarische Welt e.V.
description: Founded in 1957, the association ASW supports projects in the South that are affected by hunger and poverty. At that time, the association was one of the first NGOs in Germany who denounced the inequality between rich and poor countries. This inequality, which is a global injustice, remains a scandal. The increasing wealth of the North largely promotes the social inequality with regard to the South where poverty and famine are not yet eradicated. To address this problem, the ASW was launched to support community initiatives and local organisations in order to earn their autonomy (self-management). For 60 years, through the efforts of its donors, the ASW was able to support many of the ideas and efforts of these community initiatives which, in turn, are committed to improving the living conditions of their people without waiting for government support.. type: sse_education. curated by: INKOTA

name: Fördergemeinschaft Ökologischer Landbau Berlin-Brandenburg (FÖL) e.V.
description:
The Federation for Organic Farming in Berlin and Brandenburg - in german: "Fördergemeinschaft Ökologischer Landbau Berlin-Brandenburg (FÖL) e.V." - is a charitable organisation situated in Berlin. The main goal is conservation through the promotion of organic farming. The registered association is social network and lobby for the organic food movement in the metropolitan area. The organisation represents the organic food associations, the organic food industry such as farmers, processors, wholesalers and retailers and caterers and the interested consumers in the region.

Die gemeinnützige Fördergemeinschaft Ökologischer Landbau Berlin-Brandenburg e.V., kurz FÖL, ist die zentrale Anlaufstelle in der Metropolregion für Verbraucherinformation, Öffentlichkeitsarbeit und Marktentwicklung rund um das Thema „Bio“. Gleichzeitig agiert der Verein als aktive Interessenvertretung für Erzeuger, Verarbeiter und Händler und ist das soziale Netzwerk der hiesigen Bio-Bewegung.. type: agroecology_education;eco_art. curated by: INKOTA

name: Nachbarschaftsgarten Haus Müggelspree
description:
Our garden is a community garden. Everybody who likes gardening and plants or takes joy in joint working and creating is welcome to help in the garden. We seed, we plant, we shape and we harvest. Young and old, greenhorn or pro, we enjoy our diverse community of helpers. The garden is supposed to be a living space for learning and for calm. 
From spring to autumn, we are holding monthly garden meetings supported by professional gardeners from the „Princess Gardens“ in Berlin-Kreuzberg. We communicate the dates on tables in the garden. Anyone interested can always also inquire in Haus Müggelspree itself.  
Dieser Garten ist ein Nachbarschaftsgarten. Alle Menschen, die Interesse am Gärtnern, an Pflanzen und Mitgestaltung haben, sind herzlich eingeladen, an diesem Garten mitzuwirken. Hier wird gesät, umgepflanzt, gestaltet und geerntet. Ob Jung oder Alt, ob Hobbygärtner oder Laie, wir freuen uns über eine bunte Gemeinschaft. Der Garten soll Lebens-, Lern- und Ruheort für alle Menschen sein.
Von Frühjahr bis Herbst findet einmal monatlich eine sogenannte Gartensprechstunde statt, unterstützt durch Gärtner des Prinzessinnengartens Berlin-Kreuzberg. Der aktuelle Termin wird auf Tafel im Garten bekannt gegeben oder kann im Haus Müggelspree erfragt werden.. type: community_garden. curated by: INKOTA

name: UnternehmensGrün e.V. Bundesverband der grünen Wirtschaft
description:
Im Bundesverband der grünen Wirtschaft engagieren sich seit 1992 Unternehmer_innen, die Verantwortung für Wirtschaft, Umwelt und Gesellschaft verbinden. UnternehmensGrün setzt sich als ökologisch ausgerichteter Unternehmensverband vor allem ideell und branchenübergreifend im Namen seiner mehr als 200 Mitgliedsunternehmen für eine ambitionierte Umwelt- und nachhaltige Wirtschaftspolitik ein. Der Verein ist parteipolitisch und finanziell unabhängig und als gemeinnützig anerkannt.

UnternehmensGrün (UG©) – the German Federal association of green economy – was founded as early as 1992. Representing its diverse members, UG© campaigns for the protection of the environment and a sustainable economy. UG© is a nonpartisan, non-profit and financially independent entrepreneurs association.. type: sse_education;agroecology_education;other_political. curated by: INKOTA

name: Parcours ADRESS

Le Parcours ADRESS, parcours d’Accompagnement pour le Développement et la Réussite en Économie Sociale et Solidaire, a pour objectif de soutenir la création d’activités économiques, sociales et solidaires sur le territoire de Toulouse Métropole.

Intégré dans le cadre du plan d’actions général pour le développement de l’Economie Sociale et Solidaire « 37 actions pour 37 communes » 2012-2014 de la communauté urbaine, le Parcours ADRESS est un dispositif innovant d’accueil, d’information, d’orientation et d’accompagnement des personnes porteuses de projet en Economie Sociale et Solidaire sur le territoire de la communauté urbaine de Toulouse Métropole.. type: other_participation. curated by: RHSF

PREMIÈRE BRIQUE est la première étape d’une chaîne d’accompagnement qui permet de répondre aux besoins des entrepreneurs sociaux à chaque stade de la vie de l’entreprise. Co-porté par Midi-Pyrénées Actives et Toulouse Métropole, PREMIÈRE BRIQUE favorise l’émergence de l’innovation sociale sur le territoire de la métropole toulousaine.

PREMIERE BRIQUE est inscrit dans le schéma métropolitain de développement économique, parmi les 20 projets phares de Toulouse Métropole avec l’objectif de renforcer la présence de l’économie sociale et solidaire.. type: other_participation. curated by: RHSF

name: CoreGreen
description:
We are a conscious, green micro-business based in Malta, Europe, working to promote a healthier lifestyle, connection with the earth and the community. 
In our ecoFOOD section, we engage in the wholesale & retail side of business with the selling of Organic and Fairtrade Products.

In the ecoCLEAN section we promote and sell plant based cleaners which are free from toxins. We also retail a fantastic brand of organic & fairtrade bodycare - Dr Bronner's.. type: fairtrade_wholesaler. curated by: Kopin

name: Grassy  Hopper
description:
We believe that the food we eat is one of the foundations of how happy and fulfilling our lives can be. If we eat foods full of nutrients, energy and cleansing properties, the level of passion and commitment we can bring to our lives will increase accordingly. 

Our menu items are carefully chosen to give you high quality carbs and Low GMI foods, without refined sugars and starches. We use SuperFoods and Superherbs wherever we can to ensure that all of our food packs a punch!. type: other_foodedunpolicy. curated by: Kopin

name: Gugar
description: Ġugar! - Hangout & Bar is a co-operative effort between a group of friends who wanted to create a space for good living...a place where community can hang-out, enjoy a warm cup of tea or coffee, a beer or indulge into some of our delicious snacks. Among lots of other stuff, you will find a small but interesting library, gallery art by emerging local artists and a welcoming, friendly atmosphere. Those looking for an inexpensive delicious healthy snack or a nutrient packed smoothie or juice are in for luck!. type: other_sharing. curated by: Kopin

name: Healthylicious
description: Healthylicious is a project created by a Home Economics Teacher whose aim is to promote the love of good, nutritionally-sound food through cookery and nutrition classes as well as the sale of healthy, home-made food.. type: slowfood;other_education. curated by: Kopin

name: Koperattiva Rurali Manikata
description:
Koperattiva Rurali Manikata (KRM) Ltd, was set up in the Summer of 2007 by a group of farmers and residents of Manikata. Their general aim was to put forward projects that would help to safeguard to natural, historical, social and economic environment of the place. Today the cooperative is working on four different projects:
1. The running of the Manikata Rural Heritage Trail.
2. The restoration of the Razzett tal-Qasam.
3. The restoration of the Armoury of Għajn Tuffieħa Royal Marines Training Centre
4. The promotion of local produce and of typical food.. type: other_communities. curated by: Kopin

name: Mediacoop
description:
Mediacoop is an employee-owned workers’ co-operative that provides highly creative services in Media, Marketing, Communications and Training. It operates non-linear digital video editing facilities, and a state of the art audio studio facility, graphic design facilities, and training rooms. Mediacoop also owned Capital Radio (which was hived off in March 2009),

Mediacoop offers a mix of professionals with expertise in their respective fields. Together with its studios and equipment, Mediacoop offers a quality service to its clients, based on communication and effective teamwork.. type: other. curated by: Kopin

name: Merill Eco Tours
description:
Merill brings together a number of farmers, breeders and artisans. Thanks to this network, tourists and locals have the opportunity to experience these beautiful rural areas and consume genuine local products.

Our mission is to create alternative experiences for locals and tourists, which contribute directly towards the conservation of the environment and empowerment of the rural communities.. type: community_group. curated by: Kopin

name: Shanty Organic & Natural products
description:
Shanti Organic & Natural Products  supply a comprehensive range of food supplements from herbals to vitamins and minerals by renowned brands. Most of our supplements are vegan and vegetarian friendly.
We cater for specialized diets including gluten free, wheat free, sugar free, cholesterol free, egg free, lactose free, vegan and vegetarian. We also stock a variety of herbal teas both for health benefits and for an alternative to black tea and coffee. We do sell coffee too, Organic and Fair Traded. type: other. curated by: Kopin

name: Simply Organic
description: Simply Organic is all about organic products, we firmly believe in the organic agricultural principles of Health, Ecology, Fairness and Care. We  promote and educate about healthy ways to improve your lifestyle by organising cooking demonstrations, talks and workshops with experienced chefs using seasonal organic produce and ingredients.. type: other. curated by: Kopin

name: The Veg Box
description:
The Veg Box wants to provide healthy local produce by bridging the gap that has grown over the last 40 years between farmers of the land and consumers of the food.
They believe that produce grown in a simpler, less industrialized way, creates food for healthier family meals. This is the basis of all well-being and therefore through our choices we can begin to see the change that is needed for a sustainable agricultural system and future generation’s health.. type: agro_empowerment. curated by: Kopin
